modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about account creation and claim code timing

full_description_text:  
User is asking when accounts will be created.  
They also want to know when an employee should receive a claim code.  
This is related to the account lifecycle process.  
User may not fully understand the technical details involved.
short_description: Inquiry about account creation and claim code timing
